holdings.infoBox: HSCZ is an equity ETF with a total of 100 individual holdings. The top holdings are iShares MSCI EAFE Small-Cap ETF stock at 99.12%, JPY/USD at 0.22%, ILS/USD at 0.15%, AUD/USD at 0.15%, and NOK/USD at 0.06%.

overview.description: The iShares Currency Hedged MSCI EAFE Small-Cap ETF (HSCZ) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in small-cap stocks. The fund tracks an index of small-cap stocks from developed markets outside the US and Canada, hedged against movements in the underlying currencies for US investors. HSCZ was launched on Jul 1, 2015 and is issued by BlackRock.
infoTable: MSCI EAFE Small Cap 100% Hedged to USD Net Variant
